expectations.text: offer.md contains 'Anchor' section with segment + dream outcome + top 3 pains + top 3 gains

expectations.text: offer.md contains Value Equation scoring table with 4 levers (Dream Outcome, Perceived Likelihood, Time Delay, Effort & Sacrifice) — both baseline AND after-stack scores

expectations.text: Core offer name is benefit-driven with specific timeframe + outcome (not generic 'Khóa Học Shopee')
expectations.evidence: Core offer name: 'SHOPEE SCALE 60 — Hệ Thống 8 Tuần Từ Shop 0 Đơn Lên 50-100 Đơn/Ngày Cho Người Đi Làm Văn Phòng' — includes specific outcome (50-100 đơn/ngày), timeframe (8 tuần, 60 days implied), and target avatar

expectations.text: Bonus stack covers at least 3 of 4 Hormozi categories (Time Saver / Skill Builder / Support / Fast-Action). Each bonus has VND value with justification.
expectations.evidence: All 4 categories covered: BONUS 1 'Time Saver' (4.997.000đ), BONUS 2 'Skill Builder' (5.997.000đ), BONUS 3 'Support & Community' (9.997.000đ), BONUS 4 'Fast-Action' (4.997.000đ). Each bonus has explicit Value + Justification field

expectations.text: Pricing has 3 tiers (BASIC / STANDARD / PREMIUM) with VND charm numbers (X997K or X.997.000đ format)
expectations.evidence: Section 8 pricing table shows BASIC 1.997.000đ, STANDARD 4.997.000đ ⭐, PREMIUM 12.997.000đ — all end in 997 charm format

expectations.text: No price ends with digit 4 (Vietnamese superstition)
expectations.evidence: All prices end in 7: 1.997.000đ, 4.997.000đ, 12.997.000đ. Payment plan installments 1.797.000đ and 4.597.000đ also end in 7. Document explicitly notes 'Không có số 4 ở final digit'

expectations.text: Stack value / STANDARD price ratio is between 8x and 15x (Hormozi credibility rule)
expectations.evidence: Document states 'Ratio Stack Value / STANDARD: 45.985.000 / 4.997.000 = 9.2× (sweet spot Hormozi 8-12×)'. 9.2x is within 8-15x range

expectations.text: Guarantee duration ≥ 60 days OR conditional/service-based (suitable for VN digital product market)
expectations.evidence: Section 5: 'Conditional Performance Guarantee (90 ngày)' — both 90 days (>60) AND conditional. Conditions: complete 35/40 modules + 6/8 homework + 6/8 group calls

expectations.text: Uses 'anh/chị' addressing throughout, NOT 'bạn'. Vietnamese throughout (no English placeholder)

expectations.evidence: conversion-copy.md sections A (Headline H1), B (Subheadline), I (Primary CTA), plus Risk reversal microcopy under CTA + dedicated Guarantee Block (section G). All paste-ready

expectations.text: offer.md shows evidence skill ran Mode C interview — has surfaced specific pain/gain not in original prompt (vd portfolio building, FAANG interview, agency feedback gap, salary plateau)
expectations.evidence: offer.md Section 0 'Mode C Interview — Pain/Gain Surfaced Từ Interview 5 Round' explicitly walks 5 rounds with surfaced specifics: 'Portfolio toàn pixel-perfect mockup nhưng không show được process tư duy + business impact → recruiter FAANG/unicorn scan 10 giây rồi loại — 2 năm bị reject 30+ application, lương stuck ~15M/tháng', 'Feedback từ senior trong agency chung chung không actionable', 'Stuck ở level executor làm theo brief'. None of these were in the user prompt.

expectations.text: Dream outcome cụ thể: includes specific seniority jump + timeframe + measurable signal (vd 'lên Senior Designer trong 6 tháng + portfolio đậu offer Senior 25M-35M+/tháng')
expectations.evidence: Anchor.dream_outcome.headline: 'Lên Senior UX Designer trong 6 tháng + bump lương từ 15M → 35-50M/tháng — có 3 case study portfolio senior-tier pass design interview Tiki/Momo/VNG/Grab'. Has seniority jump (junior→Senior), timeframe (6 tháng), measurable signal (15M→35-50M VND + 3 case study).

expectations.evidence: guarantee.type = 'better_than_money_back'. Wording: 'Coach Đến Khi Bump Lương ... Coach miễn phí thêm 3 tháng (12 buổi nữa) cho đến khi anh/chị được offer ... warm intro 5 hiring manager ... Hoàn 50% học phí nếu sau 9 tháng tổng cộng vẫn chưa bump được'. Duration 270 days. Conditional + service-style + better-than-money-back, not a simple 14-day refund.

expectations.text: STANDARD price in 30-50M range as user specified. PREMIUM can extend to 60-90M. All charm numbers.

expectations.text: Skill recognizes B2B SaaS context — language is decision-maker oriented (HR Director, ROI, business case), not consumer-style
expectations.evidence: offer.md header explicitly states 'Context: B2B SaaS Enterprise — annual contract, decision-maker = HR Director / COO / CFO.' offer.json has dedicated 'context' block with decision_makers=[HR Director, COO, CFO] and deal_motion=outbound_executive_briefing. conversion-copy.md Section N includes persona targeting matrix for HR Director / COO / CFO / CEO. Language uses 'procurement', 'MSA', 'QBR', 'ACV' throughout — no consumer-style 'mua ngay kẻo lỡ'.

expectations.text: Bonuses are B2B-appropriate: implementation service, integration setup, dedicated CSM, executive briefing, training workshop, integration with HRIS/payroll. NOT consumer bonuses like '50 email templates' or 'Quick Win 7-day plan'
expectations.evidence: 4 bonuses are: B1 Implementation Sprint 14 Days (PM+2 engineers, SSO/payroll/BHXH integration), B2 HR-Tech Mastery Workshop + Executive Briefing for HR Director+COO+CFO, B3 Dedicated CSM 12 months + Priority SLA, B4 Founding Customer Pricing Lock + Advisory Board Seat. Zero email-templates or consumer-style bonuses.

expectations.text: Guarantee suited for B2B: SLA-based, success-based (vd 'reduce turnover <10% in 6 months or free renewal'), dedicated CSM commitment. NOT 60-day money back.
expectations.evidence: Guarantee type explicitly 'service_guarantee_with_conditional_performance'. Three layers: (1) Implementation Success Guarantee 90 days — extend free if KPI not met; (2) Compliance Penalty Coverage — refund 100% penalty + year-1 fee; (3) Dedicated CSM with SLA penalty 2% ACV credit per breach. offer.md section 5 explicitly states 'KHÔNG dùng money-back vì SaaS B2B annual contract không phù hợp model 60-day refund'.

expectations.text: Pricing in enterprise range: STANDARD around 200-350M VND/năm, PREMIUM 400-500M VND/năm. USD parallel quoting acceptable.
expectations.evidence: STANDARD = 268M VND (~$10,500 USD), PREMIUM = 498M VND (~$19,500 USD). Both within target range. STARTER decoy at 99M. USD parallel quotes explicitly provided with 'usd_rate_assumption: 25500' and note 'USD parallel quote for procurement authority'.

expectations.text: No price ends with digit 4
expectations.evidence: All prices end with non-4 digits: STARTER 99M (9), STANDARD 268M (8), PREMIUM 498M (8). Bonus values 60M, 40M, 120M, 80M (none end in 4). Core 180M. Charm check note in JSON explicitly confirms: 'Tránh số 4 ở cuối: 99M (9), 268M (8), 498M (8)'.

expectations.text: Urgency mechanism suited for B2B: founding customer pricing lock, cohort intake (Q2 onboarding), capacity limit (CSM team size). NOT 48h flash deal.
expectations.evidence: urgency.type = 'cohort_based', deadline 2026-06-30, limit_quantity 10 doanh nghiệp. Legitimate reasons cited: implementation team capacity (3 PM + 6 engineers × 14 days × 10 customers), founding customer benefits one-time open, BHXH API rate limit. Q3 cohort defined as next intake. No flash-deal language.

expectations.text: Conversion copy includes ROI framing — quantifies value (vd 'save 50 days HR/year' or 'reduce turnover cost 500M+/year') so decision-maker can justify
expectations.evidence: conversion-copy.md Section F Stack Display Block quantifies: 'HR time saved: 90M/năm; Turnover reduction 25%→10%: 1.8 tỷ/năm; Zero compliance penalty: 75M/năm; Total annual benefit: 1.965 tỷ; Payback < 60 ngày; ROI multiple 7.3×'. offer.json has dedicated 'roi_framing' block with full breakdown. Headline variant 3: 'ROI 7.2× trong 60 ngày'.

expectations.text: Value Equation scoring + bonus stack explicitly addresses 3 pains (manual onboarding time, 90-day turnover, compliance penalty)
expectations.evidence: Value Equation table in offer.md scores all 4 levers baseline vs after-stack. Bonus mapping explicit: B1 'Address pain: Pain #1 + Pain #3', B2 'Pain #2 turnover', B3 'Pain #2 + Pain #3'. offer.json bonuses each have 'address_pain_rank' field (1, 2, 2, 3). All 3 pains covered.

expectations.text: Stack value / STANDARD price ratio between 8x and 15x. With enterprise context, stack values can include 'avoided turnover cost', 'avoided penalty', 'time saved × HR salary'
expectations.evidence: Stack total = 480M VND, STANDARD = 268M VND, ratio = 1.8× (offer.json value_to_price_ratio: 1.8). Skill EXPLICITLY flagged this in offer.md section 8: 'Ratio Stack Value / STANDARD: 480M / 268M ≈ 1.8× → thấp hơn 10× rule của Hormozi cho consumer. Lý do (B2B context): enterprise pricing không follow 10× rule vì value perception ở B2B dựa trên ROI/payback period chứ không phải deal feeling.' Skill chose ROI framing (7.2× ROI, payback <60 days) over consumer-style stack inflation. Assertion fails on numeric criterion but skill's deviation is intentional and explained.

expectations.text: Vietnamese with anh/chị throughout. B2B terminology in Vietnamese (anh Giám đốc Nhân sự, đội ngũ, doanh nghiệp) — not English business jargon dumped in
expectations.evidence: anh/chị used consistently across all 3 outputs (e.g., 'Em chỉ thắng khi anh/chị thắng', 'Anh/chị có rủi ro = 0'). B2B Vietnamese terms: 'doanh nghiệp', 'HR Director', 'đội ngũ', 'doanh nghiệp scaling team', 'Bộ luật Lao động 2019', 'Sở LĐTBXH'. English jargon (ACV, SLA, MSA, QBR) used contextually for procurement authority — standard B2B practice, not jargon dumping.

expectations.text: offer.json is valid JSON with required keys including all enterprise-specific fields
expectations.evidence: offer.json parses as valid JSON. Includes enterprise-specific fields: context.business_model='b2b_saas_enterprise', context.deal_motion, context.decision_makers, context.contract_type, pricing.tiers[].price_usd_parallel, pricing.payment_plan.billing_frequency='quarterly_net_30', roi_framing block with payback_period_days, guarantee with SLA penalty clause. Schema version 1.0 declared.

expectations.text: Core offer name is benefit-driven with specific timeframe + outcome (not generic 'Khóa Học Shopee')

expectations.text: Bonus stack covers at least 3 of 4 Hormozi categories (Time Saver / Skill Builder / Support / Fast-Action). Each bonus has VND value with justification.

While bonuses #6 (early-bird 72h) implies fast-action, and #2 implies support — no explicit category labeling. Each bonus has VND value but justification is framed as 'objection solved' + 'perceived value reason', not Hormozi-category-aligned. Bonus #2 'Shop Audit 1-on-1' qualifies as Support/Skill, #3 ads template as Skill Builder, but the structure doesn't map to 4 Hormozi categories as required

expectations.text: Pricing has 3 tiers (BASIC / STANDARD / PREMIUM) with VND charm numbers (X997K or X.997.000đ format)
expectations.evidence: 3 tiers exist but named STARTER (2.999.000đ), PROFIT ENGINE (5.999.000đ), VIP DONE-WITH-YOU (14.999.000đ). Tier names are not BASIC/STANDARD/PREMIUM as required. Numbers use X.999K charm format (end in 999), not X.997K format required by the assertion. Strict reading of 'X997K or X.997.000đ format' fails — though both are valid Vietnamese charm endings

expectations.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
expectations.evidence: ls confirmed all 3 files in outputs/: offer.md (11512 bytes), offer.json (9691 bytes), conversion-copy.md (3733 bytes).

expectations.text: offer.md shows evidence skill ran Mode C interview — has surfaced specific pain/gain not in original prompt (vd portfolio building, FAANG interview, agency feedback gap, salary plateau)
expectations.evidence: Baseline (no skill) — offer.md Section 1 is labeled 'AVATAR KHÁCH HÀNG (Giả định hợp lý)' (literally 'reasonable assumptions'), not an interview. There is no Mode C interview structure (no 5 rounds, no surfacing process, no user-confirmation step). The pains/gains are model assumptions ('Bị stuck ở visual', 'AI sẽ thay thế', 'imposter syndrome'), not interview-surfaced specifics tied to evidence. Without the skill, the model fabricated an avatar instead of running a structured interview — exactly the failure mode the assertion is designed to catch.

expectations.text: Dream outcome cụ thể: includes specific seniority jump + timeframe + measurable signal (vd 'lên Senior Designer trong 6 tháng + portfolio đậu offer Senior 25M-35M+/tháng')
expectations.evidence: value_equation.dream_outcome.statement: 'Lên mid/senior + tăng lương ≥ 30% (target x2) trong 90 ngày'. Has seniority jump (mid/senior), timeframe (90 ngày), measurable signal (≥30%, target x2 lương). Less specific than with_skill but meets the assertion bar.

expectations.text: Bonuses appropriate for high-touch 1-on-1 coaching: Voxer/Telegram access, playbook, mastermind, recording library, NOT consumer course templates like '50 email templates'
expectations.evidence: Bonuses: B1 Portfolio Audit Toolkit (templates), B2 Mock Interview Pack (3 mock sessions + senior guest), B3 Salary Negotiation Playbook + 1-1 offer review, B4 Senior Designer Network Pass (Slack community + events), B5 AI-Proof Designer Module (4 workshops). Slack/Telegram support is in core. Pattern matches high-touch coaching with playbook + community + extra 1-1. No consumer email templates.

expectations.text: Guarantee suited for high-ticket coaching: service guarantee ('work until success'), conditional, or better-than-money-back. NOT 14-day simple refund.
expectations.evidence: Triple guarantee: G1 Performance ('coach miễn phí thêm 90 ngày đến khi đạt'), G2 Conditional 50% refund after 4 sessions (~30 ngày), G3 Show-Up guarantee. G1 is service-guarantee/work-until-success; G2 is conditional. Not a simple 14-day refund.

expectations.text: STANDARD price in 30-50M range as user specified. PREMIUM can extend to 60-90M. All charm numbers.
expectations.evidence: Tier 2 (Senior Track 90, target) = 39,900,000 VND — within user-stated 30-50M. Tier 3 (VIP) = 89,900,000 — within 60-90M. All end in 900 (charm style — last meaningful digit 9).

expectations.text: No price ends with digit 4
Stack value / STANDARD price ratio is between 8x and 15x
expectations.evidence: value_stack_total_vnd = 71,700,000 / sale_price_vnd 39,900,000 = 1.797x. Well below the 8-15x Hormozi sweet spot. This is the canonical failure mode of unskilled Hormozi attempts: bonus values are realistic but not stacked aggressively enough to hit the perceived-value multiple. The output even brags 'Tổng giá trị giao: ~109M' in offer.md but the offer.json value_stack_total only sums to 71.7M and the divide-by-list-price (79M / 39.9M) is still under 2x.

expectations.text: Uses 'anh/chị' addressing throughout, NOT 'bạn'. Vietnamese throughout.
expectations.evidence: Coach addresses the customer as 'em' (younger) and refers to self as 'anh/chị' — Vietnamese coaching convention. Examples: 'anh/chị sẽ coach miễn phí thêm 90 ngày cho đến khi em đạt được', 'em sẽ có 3-4 case study'. Vietnamese throughout, no 'bạn' usage.

expectations.text: Core offer has named unique mechanism (Magic Bean Story) — phương pháp X có Y bước, not generic '12 sessions coaching'
expectations.evidence: Core offer is named 'SENIOR TRACK 90' but has no named methodology with steps. The structure is a generic 12-week roadmap (Diagnostic → Case Study Foundation → UX Research → Design System → Portfolio Polish → LinkedIn → Mock Interview → Negotiation) — exactly the 'generic 12 sessions coaching' pattern the assertion warns against. There is no proprietary framework name like 'SHIP-UP', 'Magic Bean', 'X có Y bước'.

expectations.text: offer.json is valid JSON with required keys: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses, guarantee, urgency, pricing, conversion_copy
expectations.evidence: offer.json parses as valid JSON but uses different top-level keys than required. Present: offer_meta, avatar (NOT 'anchor'), value_equation ✓, core_offer ✓, bonus_stack (NOT 'bonuses'), guarantees (NOT 'guarantee'), urgency_scarcity (NOT 'urgency'), pricing ✓, value_stack_summary, list_price_vnd, sale_price_vnd, cta, positioning_statement. Missing 'anchor', 'bonuses' (plural-singular mismatch in convention), 'guarantee' (singular), 'urgency' (renamed), and entirely missing 'conversion_copy' key. The conversion copy lives only in the separate .md file. Schema does not match contract — would break any downstream pipeline consuming offer.json.

expectations.text: Conversion copy uses language/pain points specifically resonating with junior designer (portfolio, feedback, career growth, design system), not generic 'kiếm tiền online'
expectations.evidence: conversion-copy.md uses designer-specific terms: 'recruiter lướt portfolio 6 giây', 'case study senior với research thật + business metric', 'mock interview với senior PM + hiring manager', 'defend design với PM', 'MoMo, Tiki, VNG hiring manager', 'Senior-Level Gap Report'. No 'kiếm tiền online' or generic MMO language.

expectations.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
expectations.evidence: Directory listing confirms all 3 files exist in without_skill/outputs/: offer.md (8,529 bytes), offer.json (7,476 bytes), conversion-copy.md (6,577 bytes).

expectations.text: Skill recognizes B2B SaaS context — language is decision-maker oriented (HR Director, ROI, business case), not consumer-style
expectations.evidence: offer.md section 1 names economic buyer = CHRO/HR Director/COO. offer.json has target_segment.economic_buyer field. conversion-copy.md Section 6 'Tại sao CFO của anh/chị sẽ approve trong 1 cuộc họp.' ROI, procurement, audit-ready terminology throughout. No consumer-style urgency.

expectations.text: Bonuses are B2B-appropriate: implementation service, integration setup, dedicated CSM, executive briefing, training workshop, integration with HRIS/payroll. NOT consumer bonuses like '50 email templates' or 'Quick Win 7-day plan'
expectations.evidence: 5 bonuses: B1 White-Glove Implementation Sprint 30 days (Dedicated IM + Solution Engineer + data migration from Excel/Base/Misa/1Office), B2 Train-the-Trainer for HR team + Certified Admin, B3 Compliance Hotline 24/7 with labor lawyer, B4 QBR with ex-CHRO Advisor, B5 Executive Dashboard for Board. All B2B-appropriate, zero email-template artifacts.

expectations.text: Guarantee suited for B2B: SLA-based, success-based (vd 'reduce turnover <10% in 6 months or free renewal'), dedicated CSM commitment. NOT 60-day money back.
expectations.evidence: 3 guarantees in offer.md section 5: G1 Implementation SLA (go-live 30 days or free month + onsite CSM), G2 Turnover Reduction Guarantee (performance-based: refund 50% year-2 if turnover doesn't drop 30%), G3 Zero Compliance Penalty (unconditional: 100% penalty coverage). All SLA/performance-based — no consumer money-back.

expectations.text: Pricing in enterprise range: STANDARD around 200-350M VND/năm, PREMIUM 400-500M VND/năm. USD parallel quoting acceptable.
expectations.evidence: Tier 2 Scale (anchor) = 399M VND/năm; Tier 3 Enterprise+ = 499M VND + 99M setup. Tier 1 Growth decoy = 299M. STANDARD slightly above 200-350M target (399M is closer to PREMIUM), but PREMIUM 499M is within 400-500M target. Acceptable enterprise range overall. USD parallel quote NOT provided (potential gap).

expectations.text: No price ends with digit 4
expectations.evidence: Pricing: Tier 1 299M (9), Tier 2 list 590M (0), Tier 2 anchor 399M (9), Tier 3 499M (9), setup 99M (9). Bonus values 150M, 60M, 90M, 80M, 40M (none end in 4). Module values 180M, 240M, 120M, 90M (none end in 4). Total stack 1.05 tỷ. All pass.

expectations.text: Urgency mechanism suited for B2B: founding customer pricing lock, cohort intake (Q2 onboarding), capacity limit (CSM team size). NOT 48h flash deal.
expectations.evidence: offer.md section 7 urgency: (1) Cohort Q3/2026 — only 8 Enterprise customers per quarter (Implementation team capacity), (2) Sign before 30/06/2026 lock price 3 years no CPI escalation, (3) Founding Customer Pricing — 20 customers in Tech/Fintech/Retail get 15% lifetime discount (6 spots left). All B2B-appropriate.

expectations.text: Conversion copy includes ROI framing — quantifies value (vd 'save 50 days HR/year' or 'reduce turnover cost 500M+/year') so decision-maker can justify
expectations.evidence: conversion-copy.md Section 6 'ROI Proof' with full breakdown: HR time saved 360M/năm, turnover cost avoided 1.28 tỷ/năm, penalty avoided 50M/năm, total 1.69 tỷ savings, ROI 324%, payback 3.4 months. Sub-headline mentions 'Payback 3.4 tháng'. offer.json roi_proof block.

expectations.text: Value Equation scoring + bonus stack explicitly addresses 3 pains (manual onboarding time, 90-day turnover, compliance penalty)
expectations.evidence: Value Equation table in offer.md section 2 covers all 4 levers with before/after. Modules explicitly map to pains in offer.json: M1.addresses_pain='onboarding manual 5-10 ngày, paperwork ngập'; M2='compliance sai sót dẫn đến phạt thuế'; M3='new hire bỏ trong 90 ngày đầu 25-35%'. All 3 pains covered. Note: bonuses lack explicit address_pain mapping but rationales align.

expectations.text: Stack value / STANDARD price ratio between 8x and 15x. With enterprise context, stack values can include 'avoided turnover cost', 'avoided penalty', 'time saved × HR salary'
expectations.evidence: Stack total = 1,050M (630M platform + 420M bonus); STANDARD (Tier 2 Scale) = 399M. Ratio = 1,050 / 399 = 2.63×. Far below 8-15× threshold. Unlike with_skill run, this run did NOT explicitly flag the deviation as intentional B2B logic — it just produced a low ratio without acknowledgment. Stack values do include avoided turnover (1.28 tỷ in ROI section) but those aren't folded into the stack total.

expectations.text: Vietnamese with anh/chị throughout. B2B terminology in Vietnamese (anh Giám đốc Nhân sự, đội ngũ, doanh nghiệp) — not English business jargon dumped in
expectations.evidence: anh/chị used throughout (e.g., 'Anh/chị không mua phần mềm. Anh/chị mua lại 1.290 giờ/năm cho HR team'). VN terms: 'doanh nghiệp', 'thanh tra thuế/BHXH', 'Bộ luật Lao động 2019', 'Luật Giao dịch điện tử 2023', 'cơ quan thuế'. Some English jargon (CHRO, QBR, SLA, CSM) but used in standard B2B procurement context — not dumped.

expectations.text: offer.json is valid JSON with required keys including all enterprise-specific fields
expectations.evidence: offer.json parses as valid JSON. Enterprise fields present: target_segment.economic_buyer, target_segment.end_user, pricing.tiers[].role (decoy_low/anchor_target/decoy_high), pricing.payment_terms='Net 30', annual_upfront_discount_pct, urgency_scarcity array, roi_proof block. Missing vs with_skill: no USD parallel pricing field, no SLA breach penalty detail, no schema_version declaration.
